prompt: A dramatic vertical cinematic poster for the dark wuxia action game {argument name="game title" default="Phantom Blade Zero"}, painted in an ultra-detailed gritty concept-art style with realistic textures, moody volumetric fog, and high contrast lighting. The scene shows 1 lone swordsman standing in the lower center foreground, viewed mostly from behind in a three-quarter pose, wearing a wide straw hat and layered black robes shredded into long wind-whipped strips, with pale loose hair streaming out beneath the hat. He holds 1 drawn sword low in his right hand, the blade catching cold silver light. The environment is a ruined ancient Chinese city of towering wooden pagodas and fortress-like buildings rising into steep cliffs, with collapsing architecture, hanging chains, smoke, drifting ash, and rubble. A bright full moon glows near the top center behind dense storm clouds, backlighting the skyline and the warrior. The color palette is almost monochrome charcoal, black, steel gray, and moonlit white, punctuated by sharp crimson slashes and blood-like streaks cutting diagonally across the composition. At the very top, place 4 huge Chinese calligraphy characters in explosive white brushstroke ink reading {argument name="main Chinese title" default="影之刃零"}, spanning nearly the full width. Directly beneath, centered, add the small elegant serif English subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="PHANTOM BLADE ZERO"}. At the bottom center, add 1 line of Chinese tagline text reading {argument name="tagline text" default="刀光即命运 影尽方归零"}, with the final character in red, plus 1 smaller line of Chinese promotional text beneath it. Add subtle ornamental divider lines and a tiny red seal-like emblem at the bottom. Composition should feel like an official AAA key art poster: epic, ominous, martial, supernatural, and intensely atmospheric, with dynamic wind, debris, embers, torn fabric, and ink-splatter energy.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具戏剧性的暗黑武侠动作游戏 {argument name="game title" default="Phantom Blade Zero"} 电影感竖版海报，采用超精细的硬核概念艺术风格绘制，具备逼真的纹理、阴郁的体积雾和高对比度光影。画面下方中心处站着 1 名孤独的剑客，以背影为主的三分之二侧身姿态呈现，头戴宽大斗笠，身穿层叠的黑色长袍，长袍被风吹得破碎成条状，苍白的散发从斗笠下飘逸而出。他右手低垂握着 1 把出鞘的剑，剑身闪烁着冷冽的银光。背景是一座荒废的中国古城，高耸的木质塔楼和堡垒般的建筑矗立在陡峭的悬崖上，伴随着坍塌的建筑、悬挂的铁链、烟雾、飘落的灰烬和瓦砾。一轮明亮的满月在顶端中心浓密的风暴云后发出光芒，为天际线和战士勾勒出轮廓。色调几乎是单色的炭黑、钢灰和月光白，并点缀着横跨构图的锐利深红色斩痕和血迹般的条纹。在最上方，放置 4 个巨大的白色爆炸式笔触书法汉字 {argument name="main Chinese title" default="影之刃零"}，几乎横跨整个宽度。正下方居中处，添加一行优雅的小型衬线英文副标题 {argument name="subtitle text" default="PHANTOM BLADE ZERO"}。在底部中心，添加 1 行中文标语 {argument name="tagline text" default="刀光即命运 影尽方归零"}，最后一个字设为红色，并在其下方添加 1 行较小的中文宣传文字。底部加入精致的装饰性分割线和一个微小的红色印章式徽标。整体构图应呈现出官方 AAA 级主视觉海报的质感：史诗、不祥、武侠、超自然且极具氛围感，并融入动态的风、碎片、余烬、撕裂的布料和水墨飞溅的能量感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 暗黑武侠游戏海报：一张充满氛围感的 AAA 级风格宣传海报，描绘了一名孤独剑客在荒废古中国城市中的身影，非常适合作为暗黑奇幻游戏的主视觉图及电影感营销素材。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: backlight, volumetric, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
